testcase.name: test_pdf_export_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: PDF export failed: 520 assert 520 == 200 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features.py:205: in test_pdf_export_endpoint_exists assert pdf_response.status_code == 200, f"PDF export failed: {pdf_response.status_code}" E AssertionError: PDF export failed: 520 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_api_health

failure.message: AssertionError: Health check failed: assert 403 == 200 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features.py:216: in test_api_health assert response.status_code == 200, f"Health check failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Health check failed: E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
